properties.name: successText
properties.description: The success text for the form element.

properties.name: errorText
properties.description: The error text for the form element.

properties.name: helperText
properties.description: The helper text for the form element.

properties.name: label
properties.description: The label for the form element.

properties.name: icon
properties.description: A decorative icon the custom element should have. See the Vivid Icon Gallery for available icons: https://icons.vivid.vonage.com/

properties.name: iconTrailing
properties.description: Indicates the icon affix alignment.

properties.name: disabled
properties.description: Sets the element's disabled state. A disabled element will not be included during form submission.

properties.name: name
properties.description: The name of the element. This element's value will be surfaced during form submission under the provided name.

properties.name: required
properties.description: Require the field to be completed prior to form submission.

properties.name: clearable
properties.description: Adds a clear button to the input field that clears the selected values.

properties.name: values
properties.description: List of selected option's values in the order that they have been selected in.

properties.name: value
properties.description: Value of the first selected option or the empty string if no option is selected.

properties.name: selectedIndex
properties.description: Index of the first selected option or `-1` if no option is selected.

properties.name: options
properties.description: Read-only collections of all options.

properties.name: selectedOptions
properties.description: Read-only collections of selected options.

properties.name: initialValues
properties.description: List of initially selected option's values. Used in case of form reset.

properties.name: initialValue
properties.description: Initially selected option's value. Used in case of form reset.

properties.name: loading
properties.description: Whether the component is in a loading state.

properties.name: searchText
properties.description: Read-only property containing the current search text.

properties.name: optionFilter
properties.description: Function to filter the options to display.

properties.name: enable-select-all
properties.description: Adds a "Select All" option at the top of the options list.

properties.name: select-all-text
properties.description: Overrides the default "Select All" text.

properties.name: deselect-all-text
properties.description: Overrides the default "Deselect All" text.

events.name: input
events.description: Fired when the selected options change

events.name: change
events.description: Fired when the selected options change

events.name: search-text-change
events.description: Fired when the search text changes

slots.name: icon
slots.description: Slot to add an icon to the control.

slots.name: meta
slots.description: Slot to add meta content to the control.

slots.name: helper-text
slots.description: Describes how to use the component. Alternative to the `helper-text` attribute.

slots.name: no-options
slots.description: Message that appears when no options are available.

slots.name: no-matches
slots.description: Message that appears when no options match the search query.

slots.name: loading-options
slots.description: Message that appears there are no options to display and the component is in a loading state.

slots.name: contextual-help
slots.description: Allows you to add the [Contextual Help](/components/contextual-help/) component to be displayed next to the label.
